rules:
This lobby is hosted by Goon Squad!
💜 Welcome to our community!
1. This is an SFW lobby
Follow VRChat TOS for SFW instances.
2. No. Drama.
This includes disrespect, unsavory topics, and anything that just isn't party conversation. We're all adults here, let's act like it.
3. Treat everyone with respect
This includes verbal/sexual harassment, sexism, racism, or hate speech. Be kind.
4. This is a LIVE DJ event
Respect the DJs and save playing music through your mic for small rooms away from the main party, if you must at all.
5. Respect our Moderators and Staff
They're here to keep the party flowing. Respect their authority.
💜 Thanks for visiting a Goon Squad Smashed!

Special thanks to Muffin and the Smashed team for making all of this possible!
infoBoard: Experience a variety of live DJ performances from across the world and play games with your friends at our events every weekend! 18+, SFW only ~
